untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market breadth data (new 52-week highs and new 52-week lows across the entire market) which are not available in the provided indicator set. The HLX (High-Low Index) calculation requires external breadth data sources not present in the allowed indicators list. Allowed indicators are limited to single-security price/volume/oscillator data and do not include market-wide breadth metrics.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_12 is a breadth-based regime indicator that requires daily counts of new 52-week highs (NH) and new 52-week lows (NL) across a market index. This cannot be constructed from the available single-security indicators (open, high, low, close, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, MACD, etc.). To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need access to market breadth data feeds or a custom indicator that tracks these metrics.
